user.title: Connect to PVOutput.org
user.description: Enter your PVOutput API key and System ID. Both can be found on your PVOutput account settings page.

data_description.api_key: Your personal PVOutput API key (not the System ID).
data_description.system_id: The numeric ID of the PVOutput system you want to upload to.

entities.title: Select source entities
entities.description: Choose the Home Assistant entities that provide your PV data. Only power generation is required; all other fields are optional. Values are converted to PVOutput units automatically.

data_description.power_generation: Instantaneous PV power output. Any unit that Home Assistant recognises as power (W, kW, MW).
data_description.energy_generation: Energy generated so far today. Any unit that Home Assistant recognises as energy (Wh, kWh, MWh).
data_description.energy_consumption: Household energy consumed so far today.
data_description.voltage: DC or AC voltage reading from the inverter.
data_description.interval_minutes: Must match the status interval configured on your PVOutput system.
data_description.cumulative: Enable if the energy values are lifetime totals rather than daily resets.
data_description.net: Enable if the energy values represent net import/export rather than gross generation/consumption.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PVOutput Bridge
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for PVOutput system {system_id} is no longer accepted. Enter a new API key to reconnect. The System ID cannot be changed here — if you need to change it, remove and re-add the integration.

data_description.api_key: Your current PVOutput API key (visit your PVOutput account settings to regenerate it if needed).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or System ID.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach pvoutput.org. Check your internet connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This PVOutput system is already configured.

init.title: PVOutput Bridge options
init.description: Update the entities and upload options used by this PVOutput system.

data_description.energy_consumption: Household energy consumed so far today.
data_description.voltage: DC or AC voltage reading from the inverter.
data_description.interval_minutes: Must match the status interval configured on your PVOutput system.
data_description.cumulative: Enable if the energy values are lifetime totals rather than daily resets.
data_description.net: Enable if the energy values represent net import/export rather than gross generation/consumption.

upload_now.name: Upload now
upload_now.description: Immediately upload the current PV status to pvoutput.org instead of waiting for the next scheduled interval.

config_entry_id.name: PVOutput Bridge entry
config_entry_id.description: The configured PVOutput system to upload to.

unknown_config_entry.message: The selected config entry is not a PVOutput Bridge entry.

config_entry_not_loaded.message: The selected PVOutput Bridge entry is not loaded.

rate_limit_exceeded.title: PVOutput rate limit exceeded
rate_limit_exceeded.description:
The hourly PVOutput API rate limit has been exceeded for {entry_title}. Uploads will retry automatically once the limit resets.

To avoid this in future, increase the upload interval in the integration's options, or upgrade to a PVOutput donation account for higher limits.

This issue will clear itself once the next upload succeeds.
